Cavity Inspection Early detection and treatment of cavities are crucial for ... 15 Years of Experience About Us Dentistry Complete Oral Care Welcome to Dentistry Complete Oral Care, where your smile is our priority. Led by Dr. Ankita Savla, B.D.S., Implantologist, our clinic is dedicated to providing comprehensive oral care services with expertise, compassion, and innovation. Meet Dr. Ankita Savla Dr. Ankita Savla is the driving force behind Dentistry Complete Oral Care. With 15 years of experience in the field of dentistry, she brings a wealth of knowledge and skill to every patient interaction. As a dedicated B.D.S. graduate and an accomplished Implantologist, Dr. Savla is committed to staying at the forefront of dental advancements, ensuring that her patients receive the highest standard of care. Highly recommend!!” Runa Sharma “treatment of braces was done with good smile & fully satisfied. The doctors are friendly and professional and the quality of their work is always excellent. The clinic area is clean and well maintained and even the reception staff is polite. Thank you for the service.” kartik pillai “Im happy that I got my treatment done from Dr Ankita. First they checked my teeth, explained problems and gave me treatment options. Very well planned and executed treatment by proffesional with personal care..Quality treatment with affordable rates.. I strongly recommend Dr Ankita and Dentistry clinic.” Archita Mulik View All FAQ's 1. What digital payment modes are accepted at clinic? We accept cash, UPI transction, card payment. 2. Do I have to take appointment before visiting the clinic ? Yes, appointment is needed, walk-in patients may have to wait longer 3. What is the follow up consultation fee and follow up duration? The Consultation fees is 300rs for first visit. Fees for follow up and the duration for the follow up depends on the treatment. 4. How can I book an appointment at Dentistry Complete Oral Care? You may be able to book an appointment online or via call. 5. How often should I visit a dentist? It is often recommended that you visit a dentist twice a year or once every three to six months. 6. What are the business hours of operation of Dentistry Complete Oral Care in Navi Mumbai? The business hours at Dentistry Complete Oral Care in Navi Mumbai are Mon-Sat : 10:00AM to 02:00PM & 05:00PM to 09:00PM, Sun closed.
